text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin has suffered an injury,<n>so I've
brought her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I can hear just fine without you<n>yelling in my ear.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
This is nothing! It doesn't even hurt<n>anymore. I'm
good.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing wrong so I can jump<n>right back
into trainin—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?!
choice_data_list: We're here precisely because something appears to be wrong.
We're here precisely because something appears to be wrong.
I'll support you all the way!
I'll support you all the way!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?!
choice_data_list: We're here precisely because something appears to be wrong.
We're here precisely because something appears to be wrong.
I'll support you all the way!
I'll support you all the way!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tch...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
We don't have the time to be resting!<n>You of all
people should know that!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
If I keep getting held back like this, I'll<n>be stuck as
a weakling forever!
choice_data_list: You need to rest or else you'll never recover.
You need to rest or else you'll never recover.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Shut up, shut up, SHUT UP! Knock it off<n>with your
stupid reasoning!
choice_data_list:
Would you rather I lie and only say what you want
to hear?

Would you rather I lie and only say what you want
to hear?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hell no! I'm not some dummy who<n>wants that
nonsense!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Damn it! This injury'd better heal at<n>light
speed—or else!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin agrees to go to bed,<n>albeit rather
reluctantly.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm struck by the way she tries to get<n>back on her
feet despite her injury. I<n>reassure her that I'll
support her with<n>all of my being.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh... okay.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
That's good to hear, but sheesh...<n>You're so
irritating.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, be quiet! You're making me lose<n>focu—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: OUCH!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As a result, Narita Taishin ends up<n>worsening her
injury during training<n>and is forced to rest.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm just getting started!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tch! I'm not Ticket, you know!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Then again, shouting does make it<n>hurt less, and I
feel more fired up...<n>This is really dumb, but...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin shows off what she's<n>got and
blasts through her training for<n>the day.
